speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Active fire at the upper windows and roof edge, heavy smoke moving toward the sidewalk and parking area. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Report civilian exposure near the sidewalk. Listening

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Firefighter 2 moved seven civilians to the sidewalk near the tree line, clear of the hose line and smoke path. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Received, keep the civilian group separated from the parking area and fire truck access route. Finished.

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Three civilian vehicles are exposed beside the structure, with smoke drifting across the parking spaces. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Maintain suppression on the upper windows and monitor fire spread toward the vehicle parking area. Listening

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Smoke is obscuring the upper windows, visual confirmation of roof extension is limited from the sidewalk. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Transmit thermal image of the upper windows and roof edge. Listening

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Affirmative, thermal image transmitted from the sidewalk position. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Thermal image received, heat concentration remains at the upper windows with possible extension along the roof edge. Finished.
